parts.name: Head
parts.description: Kenny's inner head structure. Printed in 18 pieces.

parts.name: Parka Hood
parts.description: The iconic parka hood printed in two pieces and attached with small dowels.

parts.name: Neck
parts.description: Connects head and body. Sits inside the body which was filled with rocks for stability.

parts.name: Arm Left
parts.description: Kenny's left arm and glove. Fixed to the body with 2 plastic dowels.

parts.name: Arm Right
parts.description: Kenny's right arm and glove. Fixed to the body with 2 plastic dowels.

parts.name: Legs & Torso
parts.description: Torso, legs, and feet. Printed in 7 pieces and filled with rocks for weight and stability.

parts.name: Connectors
parts.description: Dowels and pegs for joining parts. Each dowel features a flat side to enable vertical printing, which aligns the layer lines along the length for maximum strength where stress occurs.
